words.definition: A unit of language that has a meaning and can stand on its own
words.gloss: A unit of language that has a meaning and can stand on its own

words.definition: What a word, phrase, or sentence represents or refers to

words.definition: A system of words and grammar used for communication
words.gloss: A system of words and grammar used for communication

words.definition: A grammatically complete unit of language expressing a statement, question, or command
words.gloss: A grammatically complete unit of language expressing a statement, question, or command

words.definition: A grammatical unit containing a subject and a predicate, forming part of a sentence
words.gloss: A grammatical unit containing a subject and a predicate, forming part of a sentence

words.definition: A group of words that functions as a single grammatical unit but lacks a subject and predicate
words.gloss: A group of words that functions as a single grammatical unit but lacks a subject and predicate

words.definition: A word that names a person, place, thing, or idea
words.gloss: A word that names a person, place, thing, or idea

words.definition: A word that expresses an action, occurrence, or state of being
words.gloss: A word that expresses an action, occurrence, or state of being

words.definition: A word that describes or modifies a noun

words.definition: A word that modifies a verb, adjective, or another adverb
words.gloss: A word that modifies a verb, adjective, or another adverb

words.definition: A word that stands in place of a noun
words.gloss: A word that stands in place of a noun

words.definition: A word that introduces a noun and specifies its reference
words.gloss: A word that introduces a noun and specifies its reference

words.definition: A word that relates a noun or pronoun to another part of a sentence
words.gloss: A word that relates a noun or pronoun to another part of a sentence

words.definition: A word that joins words, phrases, or clauses
words.gloss: A word that joins words, phrases, or clauses

words.definition: A function word that does not fit the main parts of speech and often has grammatical rather than lexical meaning

words.definition: A verb that accompanies a main verb to express tense, mood, or voice

words.definition: The noun or pronoun that performs the action or is described by a verb

words.definition: The noun or pronoun that receives the action of a verb or follows a preposition
words.gloss: The noun or pronoun that receives the action of a verb or follows a preposition

words.definition: The grammatical category distinguishing the speaker, the listener, and others being spoken about
words.gloss: The grammatical category distinguishing the speaker, the listener, and others being spoken about

words.definition: The grammatical category distinguishing singular from plural
words.gloss: The grammatical category distinguishing singular from plural

words.definition: The grammatical category indicating when an action or state occurs

words.definition: The grammatical category indicating whether an action is ongoing, completed, or habitual

words.definition: The particular shape a word takes to express a grammatical distinction
words.gloss: The particular shape a word takes to express a grammatical distinction

words.definition: A connection between two words or concepts

words.definition: The thing in the world that a word or phrase points to

words.definition: The person who is producing an utterance

words.definition: The person who is receiving an utterance

words.definition: A distinct thing with an independent existence

words.definition: An entity that is not a person

words.definition: A particular position, point, or area in space
words.gloss: A particular position, point, or area in space

words.definition: The point or period at which something occurs

words.definition: The course or line along which something moves or points

words.definition: The place where something is located

words.definition: An amount or number of something

words.definition: A circumstance that must be true for something else to happen

words.definition: The thing that produces an effect or result

words.definition: The consequence or outcome of an action or condition

words.definition: The canonical or dictionary form of a word, from which its other forms are derived

words.definition: A change in the form of a word to express a grammatical function such as tense, number, or case

words.definition: A verb form used to indicate an ongoing or completed action, or as an adjective

words.definition: The process of forming a new word from an existing one, typically by adding a prefix or suffix
